meta.title: Ryddat — Supplier documentation, without the chasing
meta.description: Ryddat tracks which certificates and declarations are missing from every supplier, drafts the request, and follows up automatically — so procurement and quality teams stop doing it by hand.

hero.sub: Ryddat tracks which certificates and declarations are missing from every supplier, drafts the request, and follows up automatically. What used to be a spreadsheet and a dozen open email threads becomes one clear view.
hero.trustLabel: Built around the documents you already handle

heroVisual.note: Illustrative preview — not real supplier data

stats.docTypes: document types tracked out of the box
stats.onePlace: place, instead of spreadsheets and inboxes

problem.label: The problem
problem.h2: Nothing here is hard. It's just scattered.
problem.lead: Most companies still track supplier documentation through email threads, shared drives, and spreadsheets. Each request is simple on its own — doing it across dozens or hundreds of suppliers is what breaks down.
problem.item1Desc: There's no reliable overview of which suppliers have complete documentation and which don't.
problem.item2Desc: Certificates and declarations expire quietly, and outdated documents keep getting used.
problem.item3Desc: Without a shared system, different employees end up asking one supplier for the same file.
problem.item4Desc: Employees have to remember who they emailed, when, and whether anyone replied.
problem.item5Desc: When an employee leaves, nobody knows what was requested, received, or still outstanding.
problem.item6Desc: Each request takes minutes. Doing it across hundreds of suppliers adds up to real hours every week.

solution.label: How it works
solution.lead: Ryddat gives every supplier a clear documentation status, and a simple path to close the gaps.
solution.step1Desc: Build your supplier list and define which documents each one needs to provide.
solution.step2Desc: One view shows missing, expiring, and expired documents across every supplier.
solution.step3Desc: Generate a request email, send it, and track the reply — with reminders when suppliers go quiet.
solution.step4Desc: Received files land in the right supplier profile, with expiration dates tracked automatically.

features.label: Features
features.lead: Not another document dump — a system built around requesting, tracking, and renewing.
features.item1Desc: Every supplier's contacts, requirements, documents, and history in one place.
features.item2Desc: Instantly see what's missing, requested, or expired. Filter by supplier, type, or owner.
features.item3Desc: Draft, send, and track requests. Ryddat suggests a follow-up when a supplier goes quiet.
features.item4Desc: Automatic status on every document: current, expiring soon, or expired, before it's a problem.
features.item5Desc: Uploads get a suggested type and key details. A human always confirms before anything is saved.
features.item6Desc: An audit trail of every request, upload, and approval, so knowledge never sits with one person.

who.label: Who it's for
who.lead: Any B2B company juggling documentation from 20–500+ suppliers: procurement, quality, and compliance teams done chasing PDFs by email.

cta.label: Early access
cta.sub: Leave your email and we'll reach out when there's something to try.
cta.note: Opens your email client — no data submitted to a server.

legal.privacyMetaDescription: How Ryddat handles personal data on ryddat.com.
legal.privacyNote: Ryddat is a product in early development. This policy currently covers only ryddat.com, the marketing website you're reading now — not the Ryddat application itself, which does not have paying customers or live user accounts yet. A separate, more detailed privacy policy will apply once the product is generally available and starts processing supplier and company documentation on customers' behalf.
legal.termsMetaDescription: The terms that govern your use of ryddat.com.
legal.termsNote: Ryddat is a product in early development. These terms currently govern only your use of ryddat.com, the marketing website — not the Ryddat application, which doesn't have paying customers yet. A separate customer agreement will apply once the product is generally available.

privacy.whoP: Ryddat ("we", "us") operates ryddat.com. If you have any question about this policy or your data, contact us at
privacy.cookiesH2: No cookies, no tracking, no analytics
privacy.cookiesP: This website does not set cookies, does not run any analytics or advertising script, and does not use any third-party tracking pixel. We don't know who you are or that you visited unless you email us.
privacy.formP1: The form on this site does not submit your email address to a server we control. It opens your own email application with a message pre-addressed to
privacy.formP1End: . Nothing is sent, and no data is collected, unless you actually send that email yourself.
privacy.formP2: If you do send it (or email us directly), we receive whatever your email client sends: your email address, your name if it's part of your email account, and the content of your message.
privacy.useLi2: To keep a record of who has asked for early access, so we can reach out when there's something to try.
privacy.useLi3: We do not sell, rent, or share your email address with third parties.
privacy.useLi4: We do not add you to a marketing or newsletter list beyond the early-access program you opted into by sending the email.
privacy.basisP: For visitors in the EEA/Norway, our legal basis for processing the contents of an email you send us is your consent (GDPR Art. 6(1)(a)) — sending the email is the consenting action — and our legitimate interest in responding to business inquiries (Art. 6(1)(f)).
privacy.retentionP: We keep early-access correspondence for as long as reasonably needed to run the early-access program, and delete or anonymize it earlier if you ask us to.
privacy.rightsP1: Under the GDPR and the Norwegian Personal Data Act, you can ask us to access, correct, delete, or export the personal data we hold about you, or object to how we use it. Email
privacy.rightsP2: and we'll act on it. You can also lodge a complaint with the Norwegian Data Protection Authority (Datatilsynet) or your local supervisory authority.
privacy.hostingP1: This website is hosted on Cloudflare Pages. As part of standard web hosting and content delivery, Cloudflare processes technical connection data (such as IP address) to serve you this page — see
privacy.hostingP2: . We don't use any other third-party service on this website.
privacy.transfersP: Cloudflare operates a global network, so your request may be handled outside Norway or the EEA under Cloudflare's own standard contractual safeguards.
privacy.childrenP: This site is intended for business use and is not directed at children.
privacy.changesP: If we change how this website handles data, we'll update the date at the top of this page. Material changes will be noted here.

terms.acceptP: By using ryddat.com you agree to these terms. If you don't agree, please don't use the site.
terms.whatP: ryddat.com is an informational and early-access marketing website describing the Ryddat product concept: a supplier-document workflow platform currently in development. It is not itself the product, and using this website does not grant you access to any Ryddat application or account.
terms.earlyAccessP: Requesting early access through this site does not guarantee that you'll receive access, on any particular timeline, or that the finished product will match every feature described here. Ryddat is under active development and the scope, design, and availability of features may change before launch.
terms.illustrativeP: Supplier names, document statuses, and figures shown on this site (for example in the product preview graphic) are illustrative examples, not real customer data, live statistics, or specific commitments.
terms.useLi1: Scrape, crawl, or systematically extract content from this site beyond normal browsing.
terms.useLi2: Attempt to disrupt, overload, or gain unauthorized access to the site or its infrastructure.
terms.useLi3: Use the site to impersonate any person or entity, or to send us fraudulent or abusive communications.
terms.useLi4: Copy, reproduce, or reuse the Ryddat name, logo, or site content for your own purposes without our written permission.
terms.ipP: The Ryddat name, logo, and the text, design, and code of this website are owned by Ryddat unless otherwise noted, and are protected by applicable intellectual property laws. Nothing in these terms transfers any of that ownership to you.
terms.thirdPartyP: This site is hosted on Cloudflare Pages. Your use of the site is also subject to Cloudflare's own terms and policies as our infrastructure provider. We are not responsible for the availability or content of any third-party site we link to.
terms.warrantyP: This site and its content are provided "as is," without warranties of any kind, express or implied, including as to accuracy, availability, or fitness for a particular purpose.
terms.liabilityP: To the fullest extent permitted by law, Ryddat is not liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of, or inability to use, this website. Nothing in these terms limits any liability that cannot be limited under applicable law.
terms.changesP: We may update these terms as the site and product evolve. Material changes will be reflected in the "last updated" date above.
terms.lawP: These terms are governed by the laws of Norway, without regard to conflict-of-law principles, and without prejudice to any mandatory consumer-protection or data-protection rights you have under the law of your country of residence.
